error_description: Bad request — invalid or malformed request body
remediation: Check request parameters and JSON structure

error_description: Unauthorized — invalid or missing API key
remediation: Verify API key is correct and active in Splunk credential store

error_description: Forbidden — insufficient permissions for this resource
remediation: Check API key scopes and organization permissions

error_description: Not found — the requested resource does not exist
remediation: Verify endpoint URL and resource identifiers

error_description: Conflict — resource already exists or state conflict
Unprocessable entity — valid JSON but semantic errors
remediation: Review request body for logical errors
Reduce request frequency or request quota increase from OpenAI

error_description: Internal server error — OpenAI server-side issue
remediation: Retry with exponential backoff; check OpenAI status page

error_description: API quota exceeded for this billing period
remediation: Add credits to OpenAI account or upgrade plan

error_description: The provided API key is invalid
remediation: Re-enter correct API key in TA configuration

error_description: The requested model does not exist or is not available
remediation: Update model name in input configuration
